query_normalized: multabench: benchmarking multimodal tabular learning with text and image computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it directly measures the performance of Large Language Models (specifically multimodal variants) on structured tabular data, which is a core component of the user's "Multimodal Tabular Learning" domain. Although it focuses on long-context retrieval rather than a full multimodal fusion benchmark, it provides essential empirical evidence on the underlying mechanism of LLMs processing table structures, a necessary baseline for any literature review on th
